title: This Seattle startup wants to turn AI prompts into shareable software
summary: The idea behind Prom is to turn AI prompts — the instructions people give AI tools like ChatGPT — into something you can deploy, share, remix, and discover. Read More
author: Taylor Soper

title: Amid rising power bills, Anthropic vows to cover costs tied to its data centers
summary: Artificial intelligence company Anthropic is making a bold promise. It says it will cover electricity price increases that consumers face as a result of power demand from its data centers.
author: Scripps News Group
